title: Falcon - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom Button configuration in Device Settings shows Microsoft Teams option as default even when Teams is not detected, with modal prompting to switch to Other Providers
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll to and tap on Custom Button configuration.
Observe the UI when Microsoft Teams is not detected by the app.
Verify that two options are displayed: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers".
Check that a message indicating Teams is not connected is shown.
Select "Other Providers" and observe the additional options revealed: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
Switch back to "Microsoft Teams" and observe the modal that appears.
Verify the modal states Teams is not connected and prompts to select Other Providers instead.
expected: When Microsoft Teams is not detected, the Custom Button UI shows two options — "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers" — with a message indicating Teams is not connected. Selecting "Other Providers" reveals additional options (Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing). Switching back to "Microsoft Teams" shows a modal stating Teams is not connected and prompting to select Other Providers instead.
